name: Dell UltraSharp U2723QE (Long Issue Text)
issue: Screen intermittently flickers with a faint horizontal band artifact near the top edge, most noticeable on darker backgrounds and when the panel is cold at power-on; the issue seems to worsen after the monitor has been running for several hours and may be related to the backlight driver board or a loose ribbon cable connection - user has already tried a different display cable and a driver reinstall with no improvement, so a hardware inspection by the depot technician is recommended before reissuing this unit to another employee.
